headline: If You Had $5,000 Right Now, Would You Put It On Tesla Or Bitcoin?
summary:
This week we posed the following question to Benzinga visitors on apex cryptocurrency Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC) and Elon Musk’s Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA).

If you had $5,000 right now, would you put it on Tesla or Bitcoin?

headline: Disney's 'Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings' Hauls In $71.4M At Weekend Box Office
summary: The Walt Disney Co. (NYSE: DIS) ruled at the U.S. box office with its new Marvel Cinematic Universe release “Shang-Chi and the Legend of the Ten Rings” breaking a 14-year-old record for a Labor Day weekend. The company also had three of the top five films now in theatrical release.

headline: Amazon Moves To Directly Compete With Fedex, UPS In Shipping Services
summary: Amazon.Com Inc (NASDAQ: AMZN) has begun transporting cargo for outside customers as the online retailer works to grow its shipping business.

headline: Ark Invest Tesla Stock Price Target May Be Outrageous, But Elon Musk Says It Is Worth $3,000 A Share 'If They Execute Really Well'
summary: Tesla Inc (NASDAQ: TSLA) CEO Elon Musk has told its employees that he agrees with Cathie Wood-led ARK Innovation ETF (NYSEARCA: ARKK) that Tesla is worth $3,000 a share "if they execute really well".

headline: Is Tesla's Long-Term EV Market Leadership Under Threat?
summary: Tesla, Inc. (NASDAQ: TSLA)'s early mover advantage has given the company a head start in the EV arena. Although the company may not be able to sustain the big lead it started out with, according to a new report.
